history.content:
<thought>
The goal (G) is visible two cells forward and two cells to the right from my current position. However, directly forward there is lava (L) on the path so moving forward now would be dangerous. I will first turn right to face towards the right side, which appears to be safe to move.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal cell G is visible to my left and slightly ahead, but there is a wall # between my current position and the goal. Also, there is lava L on my left side. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning left will face me toward the wall and goal direction, but since there is a wall right ahead in that direction, I cannot move forward then. Turning right will face me toward empty floor cells. I will turn right to explore a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The view ahead is mostly unknown, but immediately in front of me is a wall ('#'), so I cannot move forward. I will turn left to change my direction and explore another path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal (G) is one cell to my left, with lava (L) right next to it. The path directly ahead is a wall, and the right and left sides are blocked by walls except one cell to the left which is the goal cell. I need to turn left to face the goal cell and then move forward to reach it safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal cell G is visible two rows ahead and three columns to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal while avoiding lava cells around.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
